sections.name: Setting up a cloud solution environment
sections.description: Project creation, IAM, billing, API enablement

sections.name: Planning and configuring a cloud solution
sections.description: Compute options, storage choices, network design

sections.name: Deploying and implementing a cloud solution
Ensuring successful operation of a cloud solution

questions.text: Which compute service in GCP provides a serverless container execution environment without managing infrastructure?
questions.explanation: Cloud Run is a fully managed compute platform that automatically scales your containerized applications without requiring you to manage infrastructure.

questions.text: What is the primary purpose of Cloud IAM in Google Cloud Platform?
options: Control access and permissions to GCP resources
questions.explanation: Cloud IAM provides unified access control across all GCP services, allowing you to manage who can access which resources with what permissions.

questions.text: Which storage service should you use for unstructured data like images, videos, and documents?
questions.explanation: Cloud Storage is designed for storing unstructured objects like images, videos, and documents with high durability and availability.

questions.text: Which of the following are valid instance metadata that can be queried from a Compute Engine VM?
questions.explanation: All of these are valid instance metadata items that can be queried using the metadata server.

questions.text: What is a VPC in Google Cloud Platform?
options: A Virtual Private Cloud that allows you to define your own network topology and manage private networks
questions.explanation: A VPC is a Virtual Private Cloud that provides networking functionality for your GCP resources.

questions.text: Which services can be used for relational databases in Google Cloud? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: Cloud SQL and Cloud Spanner are the relational database services in GCP.

questions.text: What is the primary use case for BigQuery?
options: Real-time analytics and data warehouse queries on large datasets
questions.explanation: BigQuery is a serverless, highly scalable, and cost-effective multi-cloud data warehouse designed for analytics on large datasets.

questions.text: Which firewall rule direction is used to control outbound traffic from instances?
questions.explanation: Egress firewall rules control outbound traffic from your instances.

questions.text: What is Cloud Load Balancing primarily used for?
options: Distributing traffic across multiple backend instances
questions.explanation: Cloud Load Balancing distributes incoming traffic across multiple backend instances.

questions.text: Which IAM role includes permissions for all Google Cloud services?
questions.explanation: The Editor role includes permissions to use most GCP resources and services.

questions.text: What are the characteristics of Google Cloud Storage buckets?
options: Must be located in a specific region
Can be accessed from any region
questions.explanation: Cloud Storage buckets are globally distributed and can be accessed from any region.

questions.text: Which service should you use to deploy a containerized application without managing Kubernetes?
questions.explanation: Cloud Run allows you to deploy containerized applications without managing Kubernetes.

questions.text: What is the purpose of Cloud KMS?
options: Key management and encryption for sensitive data
questions.explanation: Cloud KMS provides cryptographic keys for encrypting, decrypting, and signing data across GCP services.

questions.text: Which of the following can be monitored using Cloud Monitoring?
questions.explanation: Cloud Monitoring can monitor all of these metrics.

questions.text: What is the main difference between Cloud Storage Standard and Nearline storage classes?
options: Nearline has higher latency and lower cost
questions.explanation: Nearline storage has slightly higher latency but lower costs.

questions.text: Which service allows you to run fully managed Apache Spark and Hadoop clusters?
questions.explanation: Cloud Dataproc provides a fully managed Apache Spark and Hadoop service.

questions.text: What is the purpose of a Cloud NAT?
options: Allow private instances to initiate outbound connections
questions.explanation: Cloud NAT allows private instances without external IP addresses to access the internet.

questions.text: Which of these are ways to authenticate to Google Cloud services?
questions.explanation: Service accounts, user accounts, API keys, and OAuth 2.0 tokens are all valid authentication methods.

questions.text: What does the 'predefined role' Editor include?
options: Full read and write access to most GCP resources
questions.explanation: The Editor role provides full read and write access to most GCP resources.

questions.text: Which network topology allows you to connect VPCs from different projects?
questions.explanation: VPC Peering allows you to connect VPC networks between different projects or organizations.
